name: ID
title: HL7 v2 ID Data Type
description: A coded value drawn from an HL7-defined code system (an HL7 table). The value must match one of the codes defined in the associated HL7 table. The specific table is identified in the field definition where this data type is used.

element.short: Coded Value for HL7 Defined Tables
element.definition: A coded value drawn from an HL7-defined code system (an HL7 table). The value must match one of the codes defined in the associated HL7 table.
